hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"[Subagent Guide]\n- Call advisor() when facing complex tasks or problems that are hard to solve\n- Report results as much as necessary."}}'

[ "$CLAUDE_USAGE_MONITOR" = "1" ] && exit 0; PIDFILE=/tmp/claude-usage-monitor.pid; if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$PIDFILE")" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; echo $$ > "$PIDFILE"; RESULT=$(CLAUDE_USAGE_MONITOR=1 claude -p '.' 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 0 ] || ! echo "$RESULT" | grep -qiE 'rate.limit|usage.*limit|quota|too many|exceeded|429|credit'; then rm -f "$PIDFILE"; exit 0; fi; while true; do sleep 60; RESULT=$(CLAUDE_USAGE_MONITOR=1 claude -p '.' 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then rm -f "$PIDFILE"; echo '✅ Claude usage 복구됨 - 이전 작업을 이어서 진행하세요'; exit 2; fi; done
hooks.rewakeMessage: Claude usage가 복구되었습니다. 이전 작업을 이어서 진행하세요:
